description: Uber Eats is Uber's food ordering and merchant marketplace platform. Its developer offering lets approved partners integrate merchant store operations, menus, and order workflows with Uber Eats.
summary: Uber Eats exposes a public no-auth MCP server and an OAuth-protected Uber Eats Marketplace HTTP API on `https://api.uber.com` for store, menu, order, reporting, promotions, and integration-activation workflows.
